name: canvas-test-nested-components
description: Tests deep component nesting: Row/Column/Card grid (4 levels), Accordion container/items (3 levels), and Wrapper/Row/Column/Wrapper/Heading chain (5 levels). Verifies parent/slot relationships survive save/load round-trip, validation passes, and rendering works for all nesting depths.
preconditions: Active default theme SDC components (wrapper, heading, paragraph, button, row, column, card, link, accordion, accordion-container) are available
